name: One-Pan Potatoes and Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice potatoes 1/4 inch thick and microwave for 6 to 10 minutes.
2. While the potatoes are cooking, toss the beef with garlic pepper and heat the oil in a large skillet over high heat.
3. Add the beef to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes.
4. Remove the beef from the skillet.
5. Add the green bell pepper to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes.
6. Add the potatoes back into the skillet and sauté for 5 minutes.
7. Return the beef to the skillet and continue cooking until heated through.
8. Season with salt. Makes 4 servings.
